Composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py to ensure all Flask routes function correctly and integrate properly with the template files. Specifically, address the missing template issue by coordinating with the template developer to ensure all required templates are available and correctly named. Maintain and improve the existing data loading and saving logic, and ensure the application starts from the Dashboard page as required.
Composition.Programmer 2: Develop all missing HTML template files for the 'RestaurantReservation' web application according to the detailed page designs specified in the requirements document. This includes creating 'dashboard.html' with all specified elements (IDs, buttons, containers, etc.) and the other eight templates  menu.html, dish_details.html, make_reservation.html, my_reservations.html, waitlist.html, my_reviews.html, write_review.html, and profile.html. Ensure templates use Jinja2 syntax compatible with the Flask backend and include all required UI elements and navigation controls.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of all pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
